rationale: Iran peace signals and Hormuz reopening prospect offer indirect energy price relief; EU accession launch for neighboring Ukraine and Moldova is strategically significant for Romania but no new qualitative step this cycle.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach, Hormuz reopening possible
top_events.summary: A potential Hormuz reopening could ease energy costs for Romania; combined with UAE fund release, deal momentum is building and may benefit Romanian households indirectly.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: EU accession for neighboring Moldova and Ukraine is strategically important for Romania's regional stability, though no new qualitative step beyond the prior confirmed launch.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Unfreezing Iranian funds adds credibility to the peace process, potentially stabilizing energy markets that affect Romanian energy bills.
